Title: Machine learning methods for cardiovascular risk prediction using clinical data
Abstract: This study reviews supervised algorithms for cardiovascular risk prediction using clinical variables and patient records.

Title: Predictive models for heart disease detection in electronic health records
Abstract: The article evaluates classification models for heart disease detection from electronic health records and structured clinical datasets.

Title: Explainable artificial intelligence in cardiovascular disease prediction
Abstract: Explainable machine learning techniques are compared to improve trust in cardiovascular disease prediction among clinical users.

Title: Deep learning and clinical features for cardiac event prediction
Abstract: Deep neural networks and traditional machine learning models are applied to predict cardiac events using clinical features.

Title: Random forest models for cardiovascular risk stratification
Abstract: Random forest and logistic regression are compared for cardiovascular risk stratification in adult patients.

Title: Clinical data preprocessing for machine learning in heart disease
Abstract: This paper analyzes missing values imputation and feature engineering strategies for machine learning models in heart disease datasets.

Title: Comparative analysis of machine learning algorithms for cardiovascular diagnosis
Abstract: Several machine learning algorithms are tested for cardiovascular diagnosis and evaluated by accuracy, recall and AUC.

Title: Feature selection in cardiovascular prediction models
Abstract: Feature selection methods are studied to improve model performance in cardiovascular disease prediction tasks.

Title: Using patient clinical history to predict heart failure
Abstract: Patient history, laboratory measurements and clinical data are used to train machine learning models for heart failure prediction.

Title: Streamlit dashboards for bibliometric analysis of machine learning literature
Abstract: This work presents dashboards for analyzing scientific publications, citation trends and keywords in machine learning research.
